title: Colorful Enchantments
body:
Get colorful enchantments now.
It changed all enchantments to have different color based on what item/tool/armor it's used. For example, general enchantment is gold, armor enchantment green and weapon enchantment red.
Also changes all enchantment level name, so instead of enchantment.level.255 it's now CCLV or instead of enchantment.level.188 it's CLXXXVIII
